subcodes.first_line: God, exalted be His glory, hath ever loved and doth love tribulation; thus it hath descended, and continueth to descend, upon Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حق جل جلاله لازال مظلومیت را دوست داشته و دارد لذا بر او وارد شده و میشود
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement
